content:
# Source Area Weathering

**Summary**: The degree of chemical breakdown of minerals in the source area.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] determined source-area-weathering using CIA and CIW indices.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] indicates the distance and environment of transport.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] calculated from Al2O3, Na2O, K2O, and CaO.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- CIA values between 49% and 70% (average 55%) indicate moderate weathering. ([[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016, p. 177]])
